headline: Is Coinbase Global (COIN) Pricing Crypto Growth Too Highly After Recent Share Surge
summary: If you are wondering whether Coinbase Global's share price still reflects its true value, you are not alone. This article will walk through what the current numbers might be telling you. The stock most recently closed at US$195.53, with returns of 27.6% over 30 days, a 1% decline over the last week, a 17.3% decline year to date, and a 6.8% gain over the past year. The return over three years is very large. Recent headlines around Coinbase Global have focused on its central role in the listed...
